problem_statement: Teams need to validate that a hosted service can call Azure Speech with managed identity after moving to a Foundry-aligned Azure AI Services (AIServices) account.
hypothesis: In a Foundry-aligned AIServices setup, an Azure Function can invoke Speech with managed identity with minimal code differences from older Cognitive Services account usage, while still supporting notebook validation.
customer_scenario: Platform and app teams validating service-hosted speech capabilities for Foundry-based assistants before building full conversational orchestration.
data_requirements: No production data. Uses synthetic text prompts and generated WAV output only.
security_notes: Prototype only. Uses a function key for the HTTP trigger and managed identity / AAD for Speech calls from both notebook and Function paths. Do not commit env/.env, keys, or recorded/generated audio containing sensitive content.
